t: UPI x Israel - NPCI x MASAV MoU
x: PM Modi's Jerusalem visit: NPCI and Israel's payment operator MASAV sign MoU enabling UPI cross-border use; part of India-Israel Special Strategic Partnership.

t: UPI One World - AI Impact Summit Pilot
x: NPCI extends UPI One World wallet to visitors from 40+ countries at India AI Impact Summit (Bharat Mandapam, Feb 16-20); no Indian bank account or mobile number required.

t: NIPL x NTT Data MoU - Japan
x: Japanese market opened for UPI QR payments via NTT Data Corp partnership.
Pilot for AI-driven UPI commerce with Razorpay; Axis Bank & Airtel as banking partners.
13 new Indian banks added including HDFC, PNB, Canara, BOB expanding Singapore corridor.
UPI becomes a launch partner for PayPal global payment interoperability initiative.
PM Modi visit leads to Cyprus becoming 2nd European UPI nation via Eurobank Cyprus.
12,000+ Singapore merchants onboarded for UPI payments via HitPay from March 22.
Indian Ambassador Vipul declared full UPI implementation at Web Summit Qatar; QNB, NIPL and NETSTARS enable QR-based acceptance across retailers.
QNB enables UPI at Hamad International Airport duty-free outlets, expanding to LuLu.
NIPL and Bank of Namibia sign deal (May 2024) to build a UPI-like domestic real-time payment system; live target 2026-27.
NIPL and Ministry of Digital Transformation sign agreement to build sovereign real-time P2P/P2M payments infrastructure for T&T.

t: UPI One World for G20 visitors
x: NPCI, IDFC First Bank and Transcorp launch UPI wallet for all foreign visitors to India.
RBI joins BIS, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore and Thailand as founding members of Project Nexus multilateral instant-payment interlink; expected live 2026.
200,000+ POS terminals across 60,000 merchants in Nepal begin accepting UPI.
Dual-launch by PM Modi - UPI goes live in both countries, RuPay cards added in Mauritius.
France becomes first European country - launch at Eiffel Tower via Lyra network.
NeoPay and Network International expand UPI acceptance across retail, hospitality, transport.
